scripts.predev:
node -e "const [maj,min]=process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number);if(maj<20||(maj===20&&min<19)){console.error('
✗ Node '+process.version+' detected. Vite requires Node >=20.19 or >=22.12.
  Run: nvm use 22
');process.exit(1)}" && node scripts/check-models.mjs
scripts.dev: node scripts/docker-compose.mjs up -d --build && node scripts/migrate.js && (npm --prefix backend run seed:support || true) && (npm --prefix backend run sync:clerk || true) && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "api,web,crystalos,sched,support" -c "cyan,magenta,green,yellow,blue" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix app run dev" "npm --prefix backend run start:agents" "npm --prefix backend run start:scheduler" "npm --prefix support run dev"
scripts.pretest:
node -e "const [maj]=process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number);if(maj<22){console.error('
✗ Node '+process.version+' detected. Tests require Node >=22 (vitest needs styleText from node:util).
  Run: nvm use 22
');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.preci:
node -e "const [maj]=process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number);if(maj<22){console.error('
✗ Node '+process.version+' detected. CI requires Node >=22.
  Run: nvm use 22
');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix app test
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix app run typecheck
scripts.infra:build: node scripts/docker-compose.mjs build postgres prometheus loki grafana
scripts.infra:reset: docker compose down -v && docker rmi -f xperiq-postgres:local xperiq-prometheus:local xperiq-loki:local xperiq-grafana:local 2>/dev/null; node scripts/docker-compose.mjs build postgres prometheus loki grafana && node scripts/docker-compose.mjs up -d
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && node scripts/docker-compose.mjs build postgres && node scripts/docker-compose.mjs up -d && node scripts/migrate.js
scripts.setup:dev: cp -n .env.example .env 2>/dev/null && echo '✓ .env created — fill in OPENROUTER_API_KEY and CLERK_SECRET_KEY before starting' || echo '✓ .env already exists'
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix app install && npm --prefix support install
scripts.setup:agents: test -d crystalos/.venv || python3 -m venv crystalos/.venv; crystalos/.venv/bin/pip install -q -r crystalos/requirements.txt
